MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-15-2012 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON JAN-28-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 PER EX PARTE ORDER DATED 8/21/12. (206)

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF'S JAVIER CANDIOTTI'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST TO PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. IT APPEARS THAT THE BASIS FOR THE MOTION WAS THE FAILURE OF DEFENDANT COMMERCIAL MAINTENANCE CORPORATION'S FAILURE TO PROVIDE VERIFICATION FOR ITS RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES - GENERAL SET ONE, FORM INTERROGATORIES - EMPLOYMENT SET ONE AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. DEFENDANT HAS NOW FILED THE VERIFICATIONS, NO EXCUSE HAS BEEN PROVIDED FOR ITS FAILURE TO DO SO IN A TIMELY MANNER TO THE EXTENT THAT PLAINTIFF BELIEVES THE INITIAL RESPONSES WERE INSUFFICIENT IT MAY FILE A REQUEST FOR FURTHER RESPONSES WITHIN THE TIME PERIOD PROVIDED BY LAW. DEFENDANT COMMERCIAL MAINTENANCE CORPORATION AND ITS COUNSEL WILL PAY TO PLAINTIFF AN AMOUNT OF $1,975.00 AS SANCTIONS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PRO TEM JUDGE: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S JAVIER CANDIOTTI'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST TO PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. IT APPEARS THAT THE BASIS FOR THE MOTION WAS THE FAILURE OF DEFENDANT COMMERCIAL MAINTENANCE CORPORATION'S FAILURE TO PROVIDE VERIFICATION FOR ITS RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES - GENERAL SET ONE, FORM INTERROGATORIES - EMPLOYMENT SET ONE AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. DEFENDANT HAS NOW FILED THE VERIFICATIONS, NO EXCUSE HAS BEEN PROVIDED FOR ITS FAILURE TO DO SO IN A TIMELY MANNER TO THE EXTENT THAT PLAINTIFF BELIEVES THE INITIAL RESPONSES WERE INSUFFICIENT IT MAY FILE A REQUEST FOR FURTHER RESPONSES WITHIN THE TIME PERIOD PROVIDED BY LAW. DEFENDANT COMMERCIAL MAINTENANCE CORPORATION AND ITS COUNSEL WILL PAY TO PLAINTIFF AN AMOUNT OF $1,975.00 AS SANCTIONS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Pro Tem Judge: Paul Renne, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JPT
